executives.name: Nicholas Howley
executives.background: Mr. Howley has served as Executive Chairman since 2018. He was Chairman and CEO from 2003 to 2018. He has been a director since 2003. He is also a director of Case Western Reserve University and the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame.

executives.name: Kevin Stein
executives.background: Dr. Stein has served as President and CEO since 2018. He was COO from 2016 to 2018 and joined the company in 2014 as COO of the Power & Control Group. Previously, he held executive roles at Precision Castparts Corp.

executives.name: Sarah Wynne
executives.background: Ms. Wynne has served as Chief Financial Officer since 2023. She previously served as Chief Accounting Officer from 2018 to 2023 and joined TransDigm in 2017. Prior to that, she was with PwC.

executives.name: Joel Reiss
executives.background: Mr. Reiss has served as Chief Operating Officer since 2023. He previously served as an Executive Vice President from 2015 to 2023 and joined the company in 2000.

executives.name: Jessica Warren
executives.background: Ms. Warren has served as General Counsel and Secretary since 2022. She joined TransDigm in 2016 and previously practiced law at Baker & Hostetler LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Nicholas Howley
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of TransDigm Group Incorporated. Co-founder of the company.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin Stein
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of TransDigm Group Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: David Barr
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director of Warburg Pincus LLC. He has been a director since 2003.

board_of_directors.name: Jane Cronin
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President, Corporate Controller of Sherwin-Williams Company.

board_of_directors.name: Mervin Dunn
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Graff
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director of Warburg Pincus LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Sean Hennessy
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President, Corporate Planning, Development & Administration of Sherwin-Williams Company.

board_of_directors.name: Gary McCullough
board_of_directors.background: Former President and CEO of ARI Packaging, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Michele Santana
board_of_directors.background: Chief Financial Officer of Majestic Steel USA, Inc. Former CFO of Signet Jewelers Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Small
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director of Berkshire Partners LLC.
